variants.name: 摄影师
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，说书人可能会唤醒一名玩家以询问谁是一位他信任的玩家。
variants.otherNightReminder: Show the player you choose the "This character selected you" Info Token and the Photographer Character Token. They then point to a player that they trust -- Mark them with the "Trusted" reminder token.
variants.flavor: Nonono, you were smiling in that picture! We're gonna have to take another one, ugh.
